project_common.outline_style: 2px solid outline included in sprite dimensions

shared_attributes.collision: ground provides landing reference, background is non-interactive

context.role: Defines ground level, provides landing reference for player, creates sense of movement through scrolling
context.screen_position: Fixed at y=0 (bottom reference), scrolls horizontally left at Current_Speed
context.usage_scenario: Always visible, scrolls continuously during gameplay, provides collision reference for player landing, tiles seamlessly for infinite scrolling

visual_specification.shape: Horizontal line with optional small rocks/grass texture below
visual_specification.texture: pixel art, flat color, minimal texture elements (small rocks or grass tufts spaced 50-100px apart)

animation.description: Tiles seamlessly - when x position reaches -1200px, resets to 0 for infinite scrolling, scrolls at Current_Speed (300-900 px/s)

visual_specification.details: 2px horizontal line at y=0, optional texture layer below with sparse rocks/grass for visual interest, tiles at 1200px width, collision reference at y=0 line

relationships.shared_with: Same scrolling speed as obstacles (Current_Speed), same primary color
relationships.differences_from: background scrolls at 0.5x speed (parallax), ground scrolls at 1.0x speed, ground has collision, background does not

explicit_negations: no perspective or depth in line itself
